sidebar.heading: Referenced from {count, plural, one {# discussion} other {# discussions}}

post_number.tooltip: Post # — click to copy the cross-reference ({ref})

settings.create_backlinks_label: Create backlink event-posts in target discussions
settings.create_backlinks_help: When a post references another discussion, insert a small system post in the target showing the referrer. Disable for forums that prefer quiet target threads.
settings.notify_author_help: Send an in-app alert to the author of the referenced discussion. The actor's own posts never notify themselves.
